verdicts.reasoning: The description accurately reflects the capabilities of the Google Ads API as stated on the homepage.
The evidence confirms that OAuth2 is the primary authorization method, including service-account flows, as stated in the record.
The evidence supports that developers can create OAuth2 credentials and use test developer tokens without prior approval, aligning with the record.
The evidence confirms that the API provides both gRPC and REST interfaces and covers a broad range of functionalities as described.
The evidence supports that while test accounts can be created without approval, production access requires an approved developer token, consistent with the record.
